lore_intro.text: Is there something you'd like to know?

choices.text: How did you lose your items?

lore_1.text: Oh, you want to know the real story? Why those items were scattered everywhere in the first place?

lore_2.text: Okay, okay. So. It was 3 in the morning. And I got the zoomies. Like, SERIOUS zoomies. I mean I was absolutely unhinged.

lore_3.text: I launched myself off the couch, rebounded off the bookshelf, slid across the kitchen floor, and somehow ended up in every single room in this house within about forty-five seconds.

lore_4.text: Every item I had went flying. I honestly have no memory of most of it. It was just pure instinct.

lore_5.text: By the time the sun came up I had no idea where anything was, and I was way too embarrassed to admit what happened. So I just... waited.

lore_6.text: Anyway. Thank you again. I really do treasure those items. Each one of them means a lot to me.

lore_7.text: ...I'm probably going to do it again tonight though. I can already feel my zoomies building up again >:3
